prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document is focused on guidance and practices related to the administration of HNIG for measles post-exposure prophylaxis as per UK Health Security Agency protocols, which primarily apply to England. While similar practices may exist in Scotland, the guidelines and specific public health protocols can differ by nation.
